Total routes: 201

============================================================

Starting geocoding...
otal routes to geocode: 201

⚠️  RATE LIMITING INFO:
• Nominatim enforces 1 request/second maximum
• Retries with exponential backoff on timeouts
• If rate limited, system will self-impose 4-hour pause
• This prevents IP blocks and allows Nominatim to reset
======================================================================
